all.en: The finance team has finalized the closing schedule for the current fiscal year.
all.zh: 財務團隊已完成本會計年度結帳時程的最終版本。

all.en: All departments must respect the cutoff dates listed in this important memo.
all.zh: 各部門皆須遵守本重要備忘錄所列的截止日期。

all.en: Purchase orders for goods received before year end must be entered by December tenth.
all.zh: 年底前已收貨之採購單須於十二月十日前完成輸入。

all.en: Outstanding vendor invoices should be submitted to accounts payable by December twelfth.
all.zh: 未結廠商發票應於十二月十二日前送至應付帳款組。

all.en: Travel and expense claims for the current year must be filed by December fifteenth.
all.zh: 本年度差旅與費用報銷單須於十二月十五日前提交。

all.en: Claims received after that date will be processed in the following fiscal period.
all.zh: 該日期後收到的報銷單將於下個會計期間處理。

all.en: Inventory counts at all warehouses will take place on December twentieth.
all.zh: 所有倉庫的盤點作業將於十二月二十日進行。

all.en: Department leaders should release staff to support counting where required.
all.zh: 部門主管應視需要釋出人力支援盤點。

all.en: Asset disposals must be approved and recorded by December twenty second this year.
all.zh: 資產處分本年度須於十二月二十二日前完成核准與紀錄。

all.en: Capital project accruals require completed documentation by December twenty third.
all.zh: 資本專案應計項目須於十二月二十三日前備妥文件。

all.en: Bank reconciliations and intercompany balances will close on December twenty seventh.
all.zh: 銀行帳戶調節與關係企業往來餘額將於十二月二十七日截止。

all.en: Foreign currency revaluations will be processed at official month end rates.
all.zh: 外幣評價將依官方月底匯率進行處理。

all.en: Preliminary financial statements are scheduled for release on January eighth.
all.zh: 暫定財務報表預計於一月八日發布。

all.en: External auditors will begin substantive testing on January twelfth as planned.
all.zh: 外部稽核將依計畫於一月十二日開始實質測試。

all.en: Department managers may receive requests for supporting documents during this phase.
all.zh: 部門主管於此階段可能會收到佐證文件提供需求。

all.en: Responses should be returned within two business days of any auditor request.
all.zh: 對稽核員任何要求皆應於兩個工作日內回覆。

all.en: Statutory filings with regulators are due within ninety days of year end.
all.zh: 向主管機關提交的法定申報文件須於年度結束後九十日內完成。

all.en: Tax provision calculations will be reviewed jointly with external advisers.
all.zh: 稅務準備計算將與外部顧問共同檢視。

all.en: Department forecasts for the new fiscal year must be uploaded by January fifteenth.
all.zh: 各部門新會計年度預測須於一月十五日前上傳。

all.en: Variance commentary should accompany every account exceeding the threshold limit.
all.zh: 超過門檻金額的每項科目皆應附差異說明。

all.en: A workshop on the new chart of accounts will be held in early January.
all.zh: 新版會計科目表說明會將於一月初舉行。

all.en: Attendance is strongly recommended for all financial controllers and analysts.
all.zh: 強烈建議所有財務經理與分析師務必出席。

all.en: Please contact the corporate accounting team with any questions about deadlines.
all.zh: 如有任何截止日期相關問題，請洽公司會計團隊。

all.en: Your cooperation ensures a smooth and accurate close for the entire organization.
all.zh: 您的配合將使全公司順利、準確完成結帳作業。

all.en: Daily status calls will run during the closing week to address open items.
all.zh: 結帳週將每日召開狀況會議以處理未結事項。

all.en: A dedicated email inbox has been set up for urgent closing related questions.
all.zh: 已設置專屬電子郵件信箱供結帳相關緊急問題使用。

all.en: Backup approvers must be designated for all signing authorities during the holidays.
all.zh: 假期期間所有簽核權限均須指定備援核准人。

all.en: System freeze windows will be communicated separately by the information technology team.
all.zh: 系統凍結時段將由資訊技術團隊另行通知。

all.en: Period thirteen adjustments are reserved for material audit recommendations only.
all.zh: 第十三期之調整僅保留供重大稽核建議使用。

all.en: Consolidation eliminations across entities will be reviewed by the regional controller.
all.zh: 各實體間之合併沖銷將由區域控制師檢視。

all.en: Management reporting packages should be distributed within five days after close.
all.zh: 管理報告套件應於結帳完成後五日內送交相關人員。

all.en: Board reporting deliverables are due ten business days following the close completion.
all.zh: 董事會報告交付物須於結帳完成後十個營業日內提交。

all.en: Lessons learned sessions will be held to improve next year's closing efficiency.
all.zh: 將舉辦經驗檢討會以提升明年結帳作業之效率。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your dedication during this critical reporting period.
all.zh: 感謝您於此關鍵報告期間所付出之心力。

all.en: Reserve account adjustments require supporting calculations approved by the chief accountant.
all.zh: 準備金科目調整須有經總會計師核准之佐證計算。

all.en: Goodwill impairment testing will be performed if triggering events occur before close.
all.zh: 如於結帳前發生觸發事件，則進行商譽減損測試。

all.en: Deferred tax balances will be remeasured following the latest enacted rate changes.
all.zh: 遞延所得稅餘額將依最新立法通過之稅率變動重新衡量。

all.en: Segment reporting allocations have been refined based on operational restructuring this year.
all.zh: 部門報導之分攤已依本年度營運重組予以精進。

all.en: Equity compensation accruals reflect the latest grant activity through November thirtieth.
all.zh: 權益薪酬應計項目反映截至十一月三十日之最新授予情形。

all.en: Foreign subsidiary balances will be translated using the prescribed reporting standards.
all.zh: 境外子公司餘額將依規定之報導準則換算。

all.en: Disclosure checklist updates are mandatory for all significant accounting policies this year.
all.zh: 本年度所有重大會計政策之揭露查核表更新均屬必要。

all.en: Press release language will be coordinated between finance and investor relations teams.
all.zh: 新聞稿文字將由財務與投資人關係團隊共同協調。

all.en: Earnings call rehearsals are scheduled the day before the official announcement date.
all.zh: 法說會預演排定於正式公告日前一天進行。

all.en: We thank everyone for their professionalism and attention to detail throughout this process.
all.zh: 感謝大家於整個流程中展現的專業精神與對細節之重視。

all.en: Honestly, the last two weeks of December feel like a marathon, but the team always pulls through somehow.
all.zh: 老實說十二月最後兩週感覺像在跑馬拉松，但團隊每次都能熬過去。

all.en: My department always orders extra coffee deliveries during closing week because nobody can function without it.
all.zh: 結帳週我們部門一定會加訂咖啡，因為大家沒咖啡都活不下去。

all.en: Don't try to push a last minute invoice through after the cutoff, your accounts payable friends will not forgive you.
all.zh: 別在截止後還想塞最後一張發票過去，應付帳款的同事不會原諒你的。

all.en: I keep a printed checklist of every closing task taped to my monitor through the entire month of December.
all.zh: 整個十二月我都會把結帳每項任務的清單印出來貼在螢幕上。

all.en: Honestly, the lessons learned session last year actually shaved three days off this year's closing schedule.
all.zh: 老實說去年的經驗檢討會議讓今年結帳時程縮短了三天。

all.en: Be sure to designate your backup approver before you leave for the holidays, otherwise transactions just freeze.
all.zh: 放年假前一定要指定備援核准人，不然交易就會卡住不動。

all.en: My team has a tradition of ordering hot pot together on the night the books finally close every year.
all.zh: 我們團隊每年帳冊終於結帳的當晚都會一起吃火鍋慶祝，已經成傳統了。

all.en: Don't ignore the variance commentary requests, even small accounts can trigger awkward questions during the audit.
all.zh: 別忽略差異說明的請求，就算是小科目，稽核時也可能引來尷尬的提問。

all.en: Honestly, my favorite holiday gift is when the IT team finally tells us the system freeze is over for the night.
all.zh: 老實說我最棒的年節禮物，就是 IT 團隊宣布當晚系統凍結結束的那一刻。

all.en: I always send a thank you card to the regional controller because their reviews honestly save us from headaches later.
all.zh: 我每年都會寄感謝卡給區域控制師，因為他們的檢視真的能幫我們避開後續一堆麻煩。
